subheadline: Three principles shape every decision, from how we plan sprints to how we onboard new hires.

items.title: Remote-first by default
items.description: Work from anywhere in our core hours. We document decisions in writing so no one is blocked by a time zone.

items.title: Ship, then refine
items.description: Small releases over big launches. We trust teammates to deploy on day one and learn from real usage.

items.title: Grow on the clock
items.description: Every engineer gets a yearly learning budget and one focused day each week for deep work and side projects.
